action: Add a read-only CI check that discovers queue update files, generates the effective queue, reports conflicts, and fails closed on malformed update identity.
memory_recovered: Operational truth is safest when canonical queue state and append-only updates remain immutable inputs while CI publishes a commit-bound derived view and treats contradictions as explicit blocking data.

observed: Generator, tests, workflow, and evidence packet were committed additively
inferred: Automated discovery prevents teams from accidentally selecting work from a stale snapshot
proposed: Require a passing effective-queue artifact before future autonomous work selection
superseded: Manual-only reconciliation of canonical and append-only queue state
unresolved: CI passage and the compatibility of all historical queue-update files remain unobserved

privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and abstract operational claims only; private chats, health, credentials, identifiers, and unreviewed uploads excluded.
verification: Source commits were returned by GitHub. Commit workflow lookup returned no run at inspection time, so runtime test and artifact success are not claimed.
next_action: Inspect the first Continuity Effective Queue workflow run; if it fails, classify each historical malformed or conflicting update without rewriting it, then add a compatibility manifest or explicit resolution record.
